items.title: I remember greatness — get this Notre Dame AI slop out of my face
items.summary: We used to live in a proper country. College football and Notre Dame football used to have the best photoshop masterpieces on the internet. items.title: It’s time to leave the Catholics VS Convicts shirt in the closet

items.title: How would you rank Notre Dame’s position groups?
items.summary: We’re doing A LOT of talking about rankings and which Notre Dame player is the best here and there, but football isn’t an individual sport — it’s a team game comprised of groups.
